holdings.infoBox: AVTM is an equity ETF with a total of 1674 individual holdings. The top holdings are Avantis International Equity ETF stock at 8.52%, NVIDIA at 5.48%, Avantis Emerging Markets Equity ETF at 4.17%, Apple at 3.89%, and Alphabet at 3.87%.

overview.description: The Avantis Total Equity Markets ETF (AVTM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund provides primary broad exposure to the US equity space, targeting securities with higher returns or better risk characteristics than a passive index. It is an actively managed fund that may also hold, in limited amounts, non-US securities focusing on developed countries. AVTM was launched on Jan 29, 2026 and is issued by American Century Investments.

holdings.n: Avantis U.S. Quality ETF Shs Avantis US Growth Equity ETF
